query_normalized: socratic transformers: dialogue-based self-teaching through adversarial questioning computer science
rationale: The paper studies the same core mechanism—using Socratic‑style dialogue in a transformer‑based language model to promote self‑teaching—albeit applied to mathematics teaching. This aligns with the user’s focus on Socratic Transformers and adversarial/question‑driven self‑instruction, satisfying acceptance criterion (a) (same‑mechanism evidence) and (d) (canonical reference for Socratic‑method LLMs).
